question: What are the application deadlines in Piemonte / Torino?
answer: For the academic year 2025/26 in Piemonte (including Torino), the deadline for submitting applications for scholarships and accommodation services is 9 September 2025 at 12:00 p.m. The application submission opens on 25 July 2025. Regarding paid accommodation self-certification, students must submit it within the time frames indicated on their personal Online Helpdesk page (exact dates not specified in the provided context). No explicit deadline for degree award applications is specified in the provided excerpts.
